name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states
TypeOK == 
    /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
    /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* -- initial state -- *)
Init == 
    /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* -- next-state relation -- *)
Next == 
    \/ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ states[i] = "thinking"
        /\ forks[i] = 0
        /\ forks[Mod(i,N)+1] = 0
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![Mod(i,N)+1] = i]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
    \/ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ states[i] = "eating"
        /\ forks[i] = i
        /\ forks[Mod(i,N)+1] = i
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![Mod(i,N)+1] = 0]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
    \/ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ states[i] = "thinking"
        /\ forks[i] = 0
        /\ forks[Mod(i,N)+1] = 0
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        /\ forks' = forks

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>> /\ TypeOK

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

CONSTANT K \* Queue capacity

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

(* q is a sequence of length K, representing the queue slots *)
(* head and tail are indices into q, modulo K *)
(* count is the number of items in the queue *)

TypeOK == 
  /\ q \in Seq(1..K, Nat) 
  /\ head \in 1..K
  /\ tail \in 1..K
  /\ count \in 0..K

Init == 
  /\ q = <<>> \* Empty sequence
  /\ head = 1
  /\ tail = 1
  /\ count = 0

ProducerAction == 
  /\ count < K
  /\ q' = Append(q, 1) \* Producer writes a '1' (or any data)
  /\ head' = head
  /\ tail' = Mod(tail, K) + 1
  /\ count' = count + 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<head, tail, q>>

ConsumerAction == 
  /\ count > 0
  /\ q' = SubSeq(q, 2, K) \* Consumer reads and removes the first element
  /\ head' = Mod(head, K) + 1
  /\ tail' = tail
  /\ count' = count - 1
  /\ UNCHANGED <<head, tail, q>>

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>> /\ TypeOK

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == 
  /\ readers = 0
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

ReadAcquire == 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE
  /\ readers' = readers + 1
  /\ writer_active' = writer_active

ReadRelease == 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE
  /\ readers > 0
  /\ readers' = readers - 1
  /\ writer_active' = writer_active

WriteAcquire == 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE
  /\ readers = 0
  /\ writer_active' = TRUE
  /\ readers' = readers

WriteRelease == 
  /\ writer_active = TRUE
  /\ writer_active' = FALSE
  /\ readers' = readers

Next == 
  \/ ReadAcquire
  \/ ReadRelease
  \/ WriteAcquire
  \/ WriteRelease

Spec == 
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Channels, ProcessIds

(* Type checking *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ state \in [ProcessIds -> [1..N -> BOOLEAN]]
    /\ channelState \in [ProcessIds -> [ProcessIds -> [1..N -> BOOLEAN]]]

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ state = [p \in ProcessIds |-> [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]]
    /\ channelState = [p \in ProcessIds |-> [q \in ProcessIds |-> [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]]]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \E p \in ProcessIds :
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = [i \in 1..N |-> TRUE]]
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![q][p] = [i \in 1..N |-> TRUE] : q \in ProcessIds]
        /\ UNCHANGED << state, channelState >>

(* Specification *)
Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<< state, channelState >>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]

(* Initial state: all keys map to some initial value, say 0 *)
Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
        /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] = 0

(* Next-state relation: Put(k,v) updates store[k] to v *)
Put(k,v) == /\ k \in Keys
            /\ v \in Values
            /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
            /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Get(k) is a read-only operation; it doesn't change the state *)
Get(k) == /\ k \in Keys
          /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Next-state relation: either a Put or a Get *)
Next == Put(k,v) \/ Get(k)

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SingleDecreePaxos ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, M

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosenValue, chosenBallot
\*   promisedBallot: the highest ballot number promised
\*   acceptedBallot: the ballot number of the accepted value (if any)
\*   acceptedValue: the value accepted (if any)
AcceptorsState == [promisedBallot: Nat, acceptedBallot: Nat, acceptedValue: Nat]

\* Proposers' state: a record with fields
\*   currentBallot: the ballot number the proposer is currently using
\*   currentValue: the value the proposer is proposing
ProposersState == [currentBallot: Nat, currentValue: Nat]

\* Helper to get the set of acceptor IDs
AcceptorIds == 1..N

\* Helper to get the set of proposer IDs
ProposerIds == 1..M

\* Helper to get the acceptor's state
GetAcceptorState(a) == acceptors[a]

\* Helper to get the proposer's state
GetProposerState(p) == proposers[p]

\* Helper to update an acceptor's state
UpdateAcceptor(a, s) == acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![a] = s]

\* Helper to update a proposer's state
UpdateProposer(p, s) == proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = s]

\* Helper to set the chosen value and ballot
SetChosen(v, b) == 
    chosenValue' = v /\ 
    chosenBallot' = b

\* Helper to set the chosen value and ballot to nil (no value chosen)
SetChosenNil == 
    chosenValue' = nil /\ 
    chosenBallot' = nil

\* Initial state
Init == 
    /\ acceptors = [a \in AcceptorIds |-> [promisedBallot |-> 0, acceptedBallot |-> 0, acceptedValue |-> nil]]
    /\ proposers = [p \in ProposerIds |-> [currentBallot |-> 0, currentValue |-> nil]]
    /\ chosenValue = nil
    /\ chosenBallot = nil

\* Prepare phase: proposer p sends a prepare request with ballot b
Prepare(p, b) == 
    /\ proposers[p].currentBallot = b
    /\ proposers[p].currentValue = nil
    /\ \E a \in AcceptorIds: 
        /\ GetAcceptorState(a).promisedBallot <= b
        /\ UpdateAcceptor(a, [GetAcceptorState(a) EXCEPT !.promisedBallot = b])

\* Promise phase: acceptor a responds

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY

(* Helper definitions *)
ChunkSize == CHUNK_SIZE
FileSize == FILE_SIZE
MaxRetries == MAX_RETRIES

(* Initialize the file as a sequence of bytes *)
InitFile == file \in Seq(0..255) /\ Len(file) = FileSize

(* Divide the file into chunks *)
InitChunks == 
    LET numChunks == Ceiling(FileSize / ChunkSize) IN
    chunks \in Seq(1..numChunks) /\ 
    \A i \in 1..numChunks: 
        LET start == (i-1)*ChunkSize + 1
            end == Min(i*ChunkSize, FileSize)
        IN 
            SubSeq(file, start, end) \in Seq(0..255)

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
    /\ InitFile
    /\ InitChunks
    /\ sentChunks = {} 
    /\ receivedChunks = {} 
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ currentChunkIndex = 1
    /\ channelState = "idle"
    /\ channelBuffer = {}

(* Send the current chunk *)
SendChunk == 
    /\ channelState = "idle"
    /\ currentChunkIndex \in 1..Len(chunks)
    /\ channelBuffer = SubSeq(chunks, currentChunkIndex, currentChunkIndex)
    /\ channelState' = "sending"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, receivedChunks, retransmitCount, currentChunkIndex>>

(* Receive the chunk if not lost *)
ReceiveChunk == 
    /\ channelState = "sending"
    /\ channelBuffer = SubSeq(chunks, currentChunkIndex, currentChunkIndex)
    /\ channelState' = "idle"
    /\ channelBuffer' = {}
    /\ receivedChunks' = receivedChunks \cup {currentChunkIndex}
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {currentChunkIndex}
    /\ retransmitCount' = 0
    /\ currentChunkIndex' = currentChunkIndex + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount>>

(* Lose the chunk *)
LoseChunk == 
    /\ channelState = "sending"
    /\ channelBuffer = SubSeq(chunks, currentChunkIndex, currentChunkIndex)
    /\ channelState' = "idle"
    /\ channelBuffer' = {}
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {currentChunkIndex}
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, epsilon, maxDrift

(* Type definitions *)
TypeOK == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ offsets \in [1..N -> Int]
          /\ \A i \in 1..N: offsets[i] \in [-maxDrift, maxDrift]

(* Initial state: clocks start at 0, offsets are 0 *)
Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

(* One round of clock exchange and synchronisation *)
OneRound ==
    LET
        avg == (1/N) * \Sum i \in 1..N: clocks[i] + offsets[i]
    IN
        /\ \A i \in 1..N: clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = avg]
        /\ \A i \in 1..N: offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + RandomOffset]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<>>  \* No other variables

(* Random offset within drift bounds *)
RandomOffset == CHOOSE d \in [-maxDrift, maxDrift]: TRUE

(* Next-state relation: one round per step *)
Next == OneRound

(* Specification: start with Init, then Next *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>> /\ TypeOK

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Clients

VARIABLE free, allocated

TypeOK == /\ free \in SUBSET Pages
          /\ allocated \in [Clients -> SUBSET Pages]
          /\ /\ free \subset Pages
             /\ /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subset Pages
             /\ /\ \A c1, c2 \in Clients: c1 /= c2 => allocated[c1] \cap allocated[c2] = {}
          /\ /\ free \cup (\A c \in Clients: allocated[c]) = Pages

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

RequestPage(c) == /\ c \in Clients
                  /\ free /= {}
                  /\ /\ free' = free \ {CHOOSE p \in free: TRUE}
                     /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {CHOOSE p \in free: TRUE}]

ReleasePage(c, p) == /\ c \in Clients
                     /\ p \in allocated[c]
                     /\ /\ free' = free \cup {p}
                        /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]

Next == \/ \E c \in Clients: RequestPage(c)
        \/ \E c \in Clients, p \in Pages: ReleasePage(c, p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>> /\ TypeOK

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES subscribers, messages, inboxes
SubscriberId == [id: Nat]
TopicId == [id: Nat]
Message == [topic: TopicId, content: Any]

\* Helper predicates
IsSubscriberId(id) == id \in SUBSET 1..Nat
IsTopicId(id) == id \in SUBSET 1..Nat
IsMessage(msg) == /\ msg \in Message
                 /\ msg.topic \in TopicId
                 /\ msg.content \in Any

\* Initial state
Init == /\ subscribers \in [SubscriberId -> SUBSET TopicId]
        /\ messages \in [TopicId -> Seq(Message)]
        /\ inboxes \in [SubscriberId -> Seq(Message)]
        /\ \* Initially, no subscribers, no messages, no inboxes
        /\ subscribers = [id \in 1..Nat |-> {}]
        /\ messages = [id \in 1..Nat |-> <<>>]
        /\ inboxes = [id \in 1..Nat |-> <<>>]

\* Actions
Register(subId, topic) ==
    /\ IsSubscriberId(subId)
    /\ IsTopicId(topic)
    /\ subscribers' = [subscribers EXCEPT ![subId] = subscribers[subId] \cup {topic}]
    /\ messages' = messages
    /\ inboxes' = inboxes

Post(subId, topic, content) ==
    /\ IsSubscriberId(subId)
    /\ IsTopicId(topic)
    /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![topic] = Append(messages[topic], [topic: topic, content: content])]
    /\ inboxes' = inboxes
    /\ subscribers' = subscribers

Deliver(subId) ==
    /\ IsSubscriberId(subId)
    /\ inboxes' = [inboxes EXCEPT ![subId] = Append(inboxes[subId], messages[subId])]
    /\ subscribers' = subscribers
    /\ messages' = messages

Next == \/ \E subId \in 1..Nat, topic \in 1..Nat : Register(subId, topic)
      \/ \E subId \in 1..Nat, topic \in 1..Nat, content \in Any : Post(subId, topic, content)
      \/ \E subId \in 1..Nat : Deliver(subId)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages, inboxes>>

\* Invariant: Messages are delivered in order per topic
TypeOK == /\ \A subId \in 1..Nat : inboxes[subId] \in Seq(Message)
          /\ \A topic \in 1..Nat : messages[topic] \in Seq(Message)

VARIABLES turn, wants

    while wants[0] do

        wants[1] := FALSE
        while turn = 0 do

        wants[1] := TRUE


    (* critical section *)
    turn := 0
    (* non-critical section *)
